TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_‚Äúkitakit_sangelu‚Äôay_a_kawaw‚ÄĚ_paymihecaan_caay_pacena‚Äô_nai‚Äô_aca_ku_nademidadan,nika_katuud_tu_ku_tademaw_misakawaway, title = ‚Äúkitakit_sangelu‚Äôay_a_kawaw‚ÄĚ_paymihecaan_caay_pacena‚Äô_nai‚Äô_aca_ku_nademidadan,nika_katuud_tu_ku_tademaw_misakawaway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/‚Äúkitakit_sangelu‚Äôay_a_kawaw‚ÄĚ_paymihecaan_caay_pacena‚Äô_nai‚Äô_aca_ku_nademidadan,nika_katuud_tu_ku_tademaw_misakawaway} }

S.FORM: "kitakit sangelu'ay a kawaw" paymihecaan caay pacena' nai' aca ku nademidadan,nika katuud tu ku tademaw misakawaway u cananay ku mahiniay cacaya a kawaw ,cacay lipay amisakakawaw cacay a lasubu tulu izaw ku lima a tatukian a misakawaw,tuwaca ngaleb katanaya', mutizeng min tu tatukian,nai' tu ku lawad mipacena', u kasatiman sa, cayay pihibang ,nai' ku nademiadan,satu u mahiniay a kawaw, mamin i kitakit a izaw amala ku cacay a bataan mang I'k a tademaw ku misakawaway‚Ä¶.. matenes i wanglu singki sa mipatahkal tu cacay ngatu mitane tu tul a iga,singangan tu sangelu'ay i kitakit a kawaw,malilid ku wangyu limulak matatengil,atu amatabu kuyni a kawaw mala" ÁáüťĀčÁłĹÁõ£", kuheni a patahekal i wanglu atu singbun tu acay ka taneng ku mikawaway, malingatu cacay a tatengaay miazih tu mitanengay. cacay demiad tusa bataan izaw ku sepat atatukian amisakawaw caay katatudung nika tatudung a likec u tapang a misuayaw tu mitanengay malingatu palekal paheci tu pakayniay i lalabu nu kawaw,"asaayaw amusakamu amutizengmin misakawaw, kaydih a tatumizengtu ,amuluungtu a mihizatu,a icelang nu uzip."mikilimay tu sakawawan mikilul patahkal nakiya amikawaw tu pina a tatukian",uyni patukil aizawtu ku mikilimay tu sakawawan pakay mihalhal tu sawantan lineng mala malimel .
S.PHON: "kitakit saŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kawaw" pajmińß…ô ¶aan ¶aaj pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° nai Ē~ ° a ¶a ku nad…ômidadan,nika katuud tu ku tad…ômaw misakawawaj u ¶ananaj ku mańßiniaj ¶a ¶aja a kawaw , ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺipaj amisakakawaw ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu izaw ku r~…ĺima a tatukian a misakawaw,tuwa ¶a Ňčar~…ĺ…ôb katanaja Ē~ °, mutiz…ôŇč min tu tatukian,nai Ē~ ° tu ku r~…ĺawad mipa ¶…ôna Ē~ °, u kasatiman sa, ¶ajaj pińßibaŇč ,nai Ē~ ° ku nad…ômiadan,satu u mańßiniaj a kawaw, mamin i kitakit a izaw amar~…ĺa ku ¶a ¶aj a bataan maŇč i Ē~ °k a tad…ômaw ku misakawawaj*.. mat…ôn…ôs i waŇčr~…ĺu siŇčki sa mipatańßkar~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶aj Ňčatu mitan…ô tu tur~…ĺ a iga,siŇčaŇčan tu saŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj i kitakit a kawaw,mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku waŇčju r~…ĺimur~…ĺak matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ,atu amatabu kujni a kawaw mar~…ĺa" ****", kuńß…ôni a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ i waŇčr~…ĺu atu siŇčbun tu a ¶aj ka tan…ôŇč ku mikawawaj, mar~…ĺiŇčatu ¶a ¶aj a tat…ôŇčaaj miazińß tu mitan…ôŇčaj. ¶a ¶aj d…ômiad tusa bataan izaw ku s…ôpat atatukian amisakawaw ¶aaj katatuduŇč nika tatuduŇč a r~…ĺik…ô ¶ u tapaŇč a misuajaw tu mitan…ôŇčaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ pańß…ô ¶i tu pakajniaj i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu kawaw,"asaajaw amusakamu amutiz…ôŇčmin misakawaw, kajdińß a tatumiz…ôŇčtu ,amur~…ĺuuŇčtu a mińßizatu,a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu uzip."mikir~…ĺimaj tu sakawawan mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ patańßkar~…ĺ nakija amikawaw tu pina a tatukian",ujni patukir~…ĺ aizawtu ku mikir~…ĺimaj tu sakawawan pakaj mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu sawantan r~…ĺin…ôŇč mar~…ĺa mar~…ĺim…ôr~…ĺ .
S.FORM: "kitakit sangelu'ay a kawaw" paymihecaan caay pacena' nai' aca ku nademidadan,nika katuud tu ku tademaw misakawaway u cananay ku mahiniay cacaya a kawaw ,cacay lipay amisakakawaw cacay a lasubu tulu izaw ku lima a tatukian a misakawaw,tuwaca ngaleb katanaya', mutizeng min tu tatukian,nai' tu ku lawad mipacena', u kasatiman sa, cayay pihibang ,nai' ku nademiadan,satu u mahiniay a kawaw, mamin i kitakit a izaw amala ku cacay a bataan mang I'k a tademaw ku misakawaway‚Ä¶.. matenes i wanglu singki sa mipatahkal tu cacay ngatu mitane tu tul a iga,singangan tu sangelu'ay i kitakit a kawaw,malilid ku wangyu limulak matatengil,atu amatabu kuyni a kawaw mala" ÁáüťĀčÁłĹÁõ£", kuheni a patahekal i wanglu atu singbun tu acay ka taneng ku mikawaway, malingatu cacay a tatengaay miazih tu mitanengay. cacay demiad tusa bataan izaw ku sepat atatukian amisakawaw caay katatudung nika tatudung a likec u tapang a misuayaw tu mitanengay malingatu palekal paheci tu pakayniay i lalabu nu kawaw,"asaayaw amusakamu amutizengmin misakawaw, kaydih a tatumizengtu ,amuluungtu a mihizatu,a icelang nu uzip."mikilimay tu sakawawan mikilul patahkal nakiya amikawaw tu pina a tatukian",uyni patukil aizawtu ku mikilimay tu sakawawan pakay mihalhal tu sawantan lineng mala malimel .
S.PHON: "kitakit saŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kawaw" pajmińß…ô ¶aan ¶aaj pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° nai Ē~ ° a ¶a ku nad…ômidadan,nika katuud tu ku tad…ômaw misakawawaj u ¶ananaj ku mańßiniaj ¶a ¶aja a kawaw , ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺipaj amisakakawaw ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu izaw ku r~…ĺima a tatukian a misakawaw,tuwa ¶a Ňčar~…ĺ…ôb katanaja Ē~ °, mutiz…ôŇč min tu tatukian,nai Ē~ ° tu ku r~…ĺawad mipa ¶…ôna Ē~ °, u kasatiman sa, ¶ajaj pińßibaŇč ,nai Ē~ ° ku nad…ômiadan,satu u mańßiniaj a kawaw, mamin i kitakit a izaw amar~…ĺa ku ¶a ¶aj a bataan maŇč i Ē~ °k a tad…ômaw ku misakawawaj*.. mat…ôn…ôs i waŇčr~…ĺu siŇčki sa mipatańßkar~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶aj Ňčatu mitan…ô tu tur~…ĺ a iga,siŇčaŇčan tu saŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj i kitakit a kawaw,mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku waŇčju r~…ĺimur~…ĺak matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ,atu amatabu kujni a kawaw mar~…ĺa" ****", kuńß…ôni a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ i waŇčr~…ĺu atu siŇčbun tu a ¶aj ka tan…ôŇč ku mikawawaj, mar~…ĺiŇčatu ¶a ¶aj a tat…ôŇčaaj miazińß tu mitan…ôŇčaj. ¶a ¶aj d…ômiad tusa bataan izaw ku s…ôpat atatukian amisakawaw ¶aaj katatuduŇč nika tatuduŇč a r~…ĺik…ô ¶ u tapaŇč a misuajaw tu mitan…ôŇčaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ pańß…ô ¶i tu pakajniaj i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu kawaw,"asaajaw amusakamu amutiz…ôŇčmin misakawaw, kajdińß a tatumiz…ôŇčtu ,amur~…ĺuuŇčtu a mińßizatu,a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu uzip."mikir~…ĺimaj tu sakawawan mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ patańßkar~…ĺ nakija amikawaw tu pina a tatukian",ujni patukir~…ĺ aizawtu ku mikir~…ĺimaj tu sakawawan pakaj mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu sawantan r~…ĺin…ôŇč mar~…ĺa mar~…ĺim…ôr~…ĺ .
